arguments.query: cost at most $300 tents Zephyra Outfitters

args.query: cost at most $300 tents Zephyra Outfitters

results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters Volume Discount Policy.
Orders with a merchandise subtotal over $500 receive a 10% discount on the subtotal. The discount applies to merchandise only, not shipping fees. No coupon code is required; the discount is applied automatically at invoicing.

Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — tents.
All tents sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 2-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — tents.
Customers may return tents within 21 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.
